commands.repair_reason: - [P2] There is a narrow mechanical repair for the unresolved WhatsApp LID disabled-policy leak; maintainer API/security review is still required after that fix.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete security-boundary issue in the unresolved WhatsApp LID path because disabled DMs can still be exposed to pre-auth hooks.; Review finding: [P1] Gate unresolved WhatsApp LID pre-auth on DM policy — extensions/w... (sha=d235c54d6bce8ab7d1fd5697db09e2fbea185075)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Telegram and WhatsApp pre-auth message hooks, grouped DM allowlist entries, `/allowlist add dm --group`, hook auto-loading logic, docs, tests, and a workspace access-request hook example.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking review finding: source inspection shows unresolved WhatsApp JIDs call `emitWhatsAppMessagePreAuthHooks` before any effective DM policy check, and the added tests cover allowlist LIDs but not disabled LIDs. Reproduction is otherwise not applicable to the feature request as a whole.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow mechanical repair for the unresolved WhatsApp LID disabled-policy leak; maintainer API/security review is still required after that fix.
